title.title: Video or Blog Title
title.description: The title of the video or blog post being repurposed

transcript.title: Transcript Text
transcript.description: Full transcript of the video content for analysis

blogText.title: Blog Post Text
blogText.description: Optional blog post text to combine with transcript

videoUrl.title: YouTube Video URL
videoUrl.description: YouTube URL to auto-fetch transcript and metadata from

maxClips.title: Maximum Clips / Moments
maxClips.description: Maximum number of key moments to extract (1-10)

quoteCardTheme.title: Quote Card Color Theme
quoteCardTheme.description: Color theme for generated quote cards: dark, light, warm, cool, vibrant

generateQuoteCards.title: Generate Quote Cards
generateQuoteCards.description: Whether to generate quote card images from extracted quotes

generateAudiograms.title: Generate Audiograms
generateAudiograms.description: Whether to generate audiogram audio snippets from quotes
